releasedThisWeek.title: RAVEPOP
releasedThisWeek.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 电子与流行碰撞的狂欢，适合舞池与耳机双重沉浸。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A rave-pop collision that works both on the dancefloor and in your headphones.
releasedThisWeek.summary: r u s s e l b u c k 以《RAVEPOP》融合电子节拍与流行旋律，充满派对氛围与未来感，适合喜欢大胆声音的听众。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: r u s s e l b u c k blends electronic beats with pop melodies in 'RAVEPOP,' creating a party atmosphere with futuristic edge, perfect for adventurous listeners.

releasedThisWeek.title: Euphoria
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 德国电子大师的迷幻氛围之旅，空灵而深邃。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: German electronic maestro's ethereal, deep ambient journey.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Schiller 的《Euphoria》延续其标志性的宏大氛围电子风格，层层递进的合成器与空灵人声营造出电影般的听觉体验。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Schiller's 'Euphoria' continues his signature grand ambient electronic style, with layered synths and ethereal vocals crafting a cinematic listening experience.

releasedThisWeek.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Lil Nas X 未完成的自白，却已充满话题与野心。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished confession, already brimming with buzz and ambition.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)》是 Lil Nas X 的半成品概念专辑，融合流行、说唱与戏剧化叙事，探讨身份与成名代价，未完成反而更显真实。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)' is Lil Nas X's semi-finished concept album blending pop, rap, and theatrical storytelling to explore identity and the cost of fame; its incompleteness feels strikingly authentic.

releasedThisWeek.title: Shion. E.P
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 日本地下电子场景的暗涌之声，冷静又躁动。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A dark, restless pulse from Japan's underground electronic scene.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Rudo 的《Shion. E.P》以紧凑的节拍和阴郁的合成器纹理，呈现日本地下电子音乐的独特气质，适合喜欢暗黑氛围的乐迷。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Rudo's 'Shion. E.P' delivers tight beats and gloomy synth textures, showcasing the unique vibe of Japanese underground electronic music, ideal for dark ambient fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场，民谣传奇的珍贵时光胶囊。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live recording – a precious time capsule from a folk legend.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《Living Free (Live Manchester '75)》记录了 Don McLean 巅峰时期的现场演出，包括经典曲目与即兴演绎，声音质朴而充满感染力。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'Living Free (Live Manchester '75)' captures Don McLean at his peak, featuring classic hits and spontaneous renditions, raw and emotionally powerful.

releasedThisWeek.title: Melodrama
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 德国流行女声的情感风暴，旋律抓耳且制作精良。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A German pop diva's emotional storm, with catchy melodies and polished production.
releasedThisWeek.summary: LINA 的《Melodrama》以流行旋律承载强烈情感，编曲精致，歌词直击人心，是德语流行乐坛的亮眼之作。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: LINA's 'Melodrama' packs strong emotions into pop melodies, with refined arrangements and heartfelt lyrics, standing out in the German pop scene.

releasedThisWeek.title: Convenience Store Gospel
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 便利店福音？一首荒诞又真诚的另类乡村小品。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Convenience store gospel? An absurd yet sincere alt-country gem.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Brodie Milner 的《Convenience Store Gospel》是一首单曲，以幽默视角描绘日常荒诞，吉他轻快，歌词充满奇思妙想。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Brodie Milner's 'Convenience Store Gospel' is a single that finds humor in everyday absurdity, with upbeat guitar and whimsical lyrics.

releasedThisWeek.title: Galaxia Tropical
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 热带哥伦比亚的律动狂欢，复古拉丁节拍永不褪色。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A tropical Colombian rhythm fiesta – vintage Latin beats that never fade.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical 的《Galaxia Tropical》充满南美热带风情，铜管与打击乐交织，是派对与夏日的最佳配乐。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical's 'Galaxia Tropical' overflows with South American tropical vibes, brass and percussion intertwining for the ultimate party and summer soundtrack.

releasedThisWeek.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Robin Trower 美国现场，布鲁斯摇滚吉他的教科书级演绎。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Robin Trower live in the USA – a masterclass in blues-rock guitar.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《One Moment in Time: Live in the USA》记录 Robin Trower 标志性的吉他演奏，浑厚的布鲁斯摇滚音色与即兴段落令人沉醉。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'One Moment in Time: Live in the USA' captures Robin Trower's iconic guitar work, with thick blues-rock tones and improvisational passages that mesmerize.

releasedThisWeek.title: Metal - The Exclusive EP
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 芬兰儿童重金属乐队，可爱与金属的奇妙化学反应。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Finnish kids' heavy metal band – a delightful chemical reaction of cute and metal.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Heavysaurus 的《Metal - The Exclusive EP》以儿童友好的方式演绎重金属，旋律洗脑，造型可爱，是全家欢的金属入门。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Heavysaurus's 'Metal - The Exclusive EP' delivers heavy metal in a kid-friendly way, with catchy riffs and cute costumes – a family-friendly metal gateway.

releasedThisWeek.title: Warehouse 10 Volume 15
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Dave Matthews Band 现场系列再添新卷，即兴与热情的完美结合。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Another volume in DMB's live series, perfect fusion of improvisation and passion.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《Warehouse 10 Volume 15》是 Dave Matthews Band 长期现场系列的最新作品，收录多首即兴演奏与观众互动，展现乐队无与伦比的现场能量。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'Warehouse 10 Volume 15' is the latest in DMB's long-running live series, featuring extended jams and crowd interaction, showcasing the band's unmatched live energy.

upcoming.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
upcoming.highlight: 现象级流行巨星未完成的自白，注定引爆话题
upcoming.highlightEn: A pop phenomenon's unfinished confession, destined to spark conversation
upcoming.summary: Lil Nas X以未完成状态发布专辑，充满自省与挑衅，融合流行与说唱元素，展现其不拘一格的音乐野心。
upcoming.summaryEn: Lil Nas X releases an unfinished album full of introspection and provocation, blending pop and rap to showcase his unorthodox musical ambition.

upcoming.title: Euphoria
upcoming.highlight: 德国电子大师的迷幻氛围之旅
upcoming.highlightEn: German electronic maestro's psychedelic ambient journey
upcoming.summary: Schiller的《Euphoria》延续其标志性的宏大电子音景，融合空灵人声与交响元素，营造沉浸式听觉体验。
upcoming.summaryEn: Schiller's 'Euphoria' continues his signature grand electronic soundscapes, blending ethereal vocals and symphonic elements for an immersive listening experience.

upcoming.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
upcoming.highlight: 民谣传奇1975年曼彻斯特现场，时光倒流的感动
upcoming.highlightEn: Folk legend's 1975 Manchester live, a time-traveling emotional gem
upcoming.summary: Don McLean现场专辑捕捉其巅峰时期的即兴魅力与诗意叙事，音质修复后更显珍贵。
upcoming.summaryEn: Don McLean's live album captures his peak-era improvisational charm and poetic storytelling, with restored audio making it a treasured release.

upcoming.title: Together Again
upcoming.highlight: 两位民谣老将的温暖合奏，友谊与时代的回响
upcoming.highlightEn: Warm collaboration between two folk veterans, an echo of friendship and era
upcoming.summary: John McCutcheon与Tom Paxton联手，用质朴的吉他与人声讲述平凡生活中的深刻故事，适合安静聆听。
upcoming.summaryEn: John McCutcheon and Tom Paxton join forces, using simple guitar and vocals to tell profound stories from everyday life—perfect for quiet listening.

upcoming.title: The Power Station
upcoming.highlight: 同名专辑经典重版，放克摇滚的原始能量
upcoming.highlightEn: Classic self-titled reissue, raw funk-rock energy
upcoming.summary: The Power Station的同名专辑以强劲的贝斯线与爆发力 vocals著称，此次再版让新一代听众感受80年代舞池炸弹的魅力。
upcoming.summaryEn: The Power Station's self-titled album, known for its thumping bass lines and explosive vocals, gets a reissue that lets new generations feel the 80s dancefloor bomb.

upcoming.title: RAVEPOP
upcoming.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
upcoming.highlight: 地下电子狂人的混沌狂欢，反叛的声波实验
upcoming.highlightEn: Underground electronic madman's chaotic rave, a rebellious sonic experiment
upcoming.summary: r u s s e l b u c k的《RAVEPOP》解构流行旋律，注入工业噪音与碎拍，挑战听众的听觉边界。
upcoming.summaryEn: r u s s e l b u c k's 'RAVEPOP' deconstructs pop melodies, injecting industrial noise and breakbeats, challenging listeners' auditory boundaries.

upcoming.title: Shion. E.P
upcoming.highlight: 日本地下场景的迷幻电子EP，短小精悍的听觉漩涡
upcoming.highlightEn: Japanese underground psychedelic electronic EP, a concise auditory vortex
upcoming.summary: Rudo的《Shion. E.P》以细腻的合成器纹理与不规则的节奏编织出如梦似幻的声景，适合深夜独处。
upcoming.summaryEn: Rudo's 'Shion. E.P' weaves dreamlike soundscapes with delicate synth textures and irregular rhythms, ideal for late-night solitude.

upcoming.title: Galaxia Tropical
upcoming.highlight: 秘鲁热带节拍的宝藏挖掘，拉丁灵魂的律动
upcoming.highlightEn: Peruvian tropical beat treasure, Latin soul groove
upcoming.summary: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical带来热情洋溢的秘鲁热带音乐，融合放克与亚马逊节奏，是舞池与考古爱好者的双赢。
upcoming.summaryEn: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical delivers exuberant Peruvian tropical music, blending funk with Amazonian rhythms—a win for both dance floors and music archaeologists.

upcoming.title: Utan Ok Innan
upcoming.highlight: 冰岛黑金属的冷冽风暴，原始而暴烈
upcoming.highlightEn: Icelandic black metal's cold storm, raw and violent
upcoming.summary: Vígundr的单曲《Utan Ok Innan》以刺骨冰寒的吉他音墙与嘶吼，延续北欧黑金属的纯粹与残酷。
upcoming.summaryEn: Vígundr's single 'Utan Ok Innan' continues the pure brutality of Nordic black metal with icy guitar walls and shrieking vocals.

upcoming.title: Eingenordet
upcoming.highlight: 德国中世纪民谣金属的豪迈酒歌，史诗与狂欢并存
upcoming.highlightEn: German medieval folk metal's hearty drinking songs, epic meets revelry
upcoming.summary: Versengold的《Eingenordet》用风笛、手风琴与重失真吉他，营造出北欧海盗般的壮阔与欢庆氛围。
upcoming.summaryEn: Versengold's 'Eingenordet' uses bagpipes, accordion, and heavy distorted guitars to create a Viking-like atmosphere of grandeur and celebration.
